repository.description: Waveform Editor tool for Move Everything - trim, gain adjust, normalize, and edit WAV files on the Ableton Move

commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix recording race condition and improve recorded file handling

- Add "stopping" state to poll sampler finalization before loading WAV,
  preventing "No waveform data" error from async stop
- Show "SAVING..." screen while waiting for WAV to finalize
- Track recorded files as unsaved (dirty) with discard-on-exit cleanup
- Add timestamp to edit filenames (sample_edit_0306_1423.wav)
- Clean up recording UI header (remove debug VU display)
- Add dirty param support to DSP plugin

commit.message:
raw body multipart parsing for PDF upload

Replace formidable with manual raw body stream reading to handle large
PDFs without stream cutoff. Reads full request body as Buffer, parses
multipart boundary manually to extract PDF content.

- Removed formidable dependency from route
- Added getRawBody() to stream full request into Buffer
- Added parseMultipart() to extract file from multipart boundary
- Set responseLimit: false and bodyParser: false in route config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(web): VideoPlayer — guard against non-finite currentTime

Setting video.currentTime = NaN throws TypeError. Add isFinite check.

commit.message:
Content quality upgrade: logos, aspect ratio, bg removal, color grading

7-phase quality upgrade to match @airesearches-level output:

Phase 1: Bundle 30 company logos in server/logos/ for instant,
rate-limit-proof access (bypasses Wikimedia HTTP 429)

Phase 2: DALL-E 3 aspect ratio 1024x1024 → 1024x1792 (vertical
portrait, matches Instagram 4:5 without awkward cropping)

Phase 3: AI background removal via @imgly/background-removal-node
for clean person cutouts (replaces vignette mask fallback)

Phase 4: Logo badge compositing on ALL content slides (not just
cover) — dark circular badges in top-right corner

Phase 5: Creative Director biased toward person_composite strategy,
expanded KNOWN_FIGURES (26→45) and COMPANY_TO_CEO (27→46),
loosened validation to allow non-verified figures with search query

Phase 6: Marketing Brain prompts upgraded with Nano Banana "Perfect
Prompt Formula" (Setting→Camera→Subject→Lighting→Mood→Quality),
specific lens/aperture directives, named lighting recipes

Phase 7: Color grading post-processing (saturation +25%, contrast
+15%, sharpening) for cinematic look on all content slides

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Footer was inside #appFrame (red bg) with brightness-0 invert making it white.
Now matches public/index.html — outside appFrame on cream background, natural black logo.

feat: add northwest and southwest map queries

- Add campaign-delivery-map-nw and campaign-delivery-map-sw computed
  queries to queries.yaml, matching the NE/SE pattern with region params
- Add northwest/southwest to REGION_STATE_SETS in gcp-metrics.js
  (WA/OR/ID/MT/WY/ND/SD/MN/WI/MI and CA/NV/AZ/NM/UT/CO/TX/OK/KS/NE)
- Wire dashboards.yaml NW/SW map widgets to the new queryIds instead
  of falling back to the nationwide campaign-delivery-map query

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: shop hover tracks Module ref to prevent post-purchase cursor drift

ShopPanel._hover_mod is now a Module reference instead of a build-time
array index. After remove_offer() shrinks _cards/_offers, the old index
could point at the wrong card — causing hover highlights to shift one or
two cards to the right and visual drift after purchase.

Hover callbacks now bind .bind(mod) and use _offers.find(mod) at call
time to resolve the current stable index.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: mock OpenBK relay simulator for end-to-end testing

mock_openbk.py connects to the same broker as the main app and mirrors
the hardware autoexec rules: single-relay-at-a-time enforcement, 600s
failsafe timer, state feedback on sprinkler/{channel}/get. Reads
broker credentials from zones.yaml; CLI args --host/--port/--username/
--password override. Run alongside app.py with dry_run: false.

feat: add optional HTTP API for direct Claude prompts

Adds REST endpoints (POST /api/prompt, GET /api/health) using native
node:http, controlled by ENABLE_API env var. Prompts are sent via
stdin (claude -p -) to avoid shell injection. A dedicated container
is lazily initialized on first request and reused for subsequent calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix lobby preferences not persisting: save effect was overwriting on mount

The save useEffect fired on first render with default values before the
load useEffect could restore saved preferences. Use prefsLoaded state
flag so saving only starts after the initial load completes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Deduplicate CT/RT dispatch in SIMD Horner via for_k helper

Extract a `for_k` lambda that encapsulates the `if constexpr (N != 0)
{ static_for } else { for }` pattern, replacing duplicated blocks in
both the tile loop and single-batch loop of the SIMD Horner function.
Same extraction applied to the polyfit.hpp mirror.

Shorten `poly_eval::detail::fma` to `detail::fma` in fast_eval_impl.hpp
and polyfit.hpp bulk eval (already inside namespace poly_eval).

Rewrite bench_horner.cpp: hoist allocations and RNG out of timed
lambdas so measurements reflect pure compute throughput, add aligned vs
unaligned SIMD variants, and print a peak-throughput summary table
comparing measured GFLOPS against estimated hardware DP peak.

commit.message:
Fix filter banner: append after vis.Network creation

vis.Network takes over the container DOM, so the banner must be
appended after the network is created to sit on top of the canvas.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add comprehensive configuration test coverage (#14)

* Add comprehensive configuration test coverage

- ConfigurationTest: 49 tests validating the config tree directly
  - Default values, format validation (valid/invalid), quality bounds (min/max),
    blur settings, fit modes, device/image sizes, all loader types (filesystem,
    flysystem, vich, url), transformer types (glide, imgix, service), driver
    validation, flysystem-without-storage error, filesystem-with-storage error,
    disabled loaders/transformers, multiple loaders of same type, mixed loader
    types, explicit defaults, and a full realistic configuration
- FullConfigTest: 33 tests with a FullConfigKernel exercising non-default values
  - Multiple filesystem loaders, disabled loader/transformer, Imgix (signed +
    unsigned), service-type transformer, custom device/image sizes, custom
    formats (webp+png), custom quality/fit, blur placeholder with custom
    settings, upscaling prevention, explicit loader/transformer overrides,
    pipeline default resolution, and render-level HTML assertions

https://claude.ai/code/session_015FRrSrDh2pv1viRTQZ1hCP

* Fix PHPStan errors in ConfigurationTest

Add PHPDoc type annotations to processConfig() and ignore
offsetAccess.nonOffsetAccessible and argument.type errors for the
test file, since the Symfony config tree finalize() returns mixed.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015FRrSrDh2pv1viRTQZ1hCP

* Use @phpstan-type for config typing instead of ignoreErrors

Define PicassoConfig, BlurConfig, LoaderConfig, and TransformerConfig
PHPStan types to properly type the nested config array returned by
processConfig(), removing the need for ignoreErrors in phpstan.neon.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015FRrSrDh2pv1viRTQZ1hCP

* Fix PHP CS Fixer single-line docblock style violation

Use an intermediate variable with @var annotation instead of an
inline return cast, satisfying both PHP CS Fixer and PHPStan.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015FRrSrDh2pv1viRTQZ1hCP

commit.message:
fix(tls): add NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS for Bun-based tools

Claude Code uses Bun runtime which has its own BoringSSL cert store.
Bun respects NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS to load additional CAs. Point both
NIX_SSL_CERT_FILE and NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS to the merged system bundle.

commit.message:
Initial commit: ADS security free theorem formalized in Cubical Agda

Three formalized examples using agda-bridges (internal parametricity):
- AuthFreeThm.agda: prover/verifier agreement for authenticated data structures
- TinyFreeThms.agda: identity and Church bool free theorems
- Noninterference.agda: secret independence via total relation

All typecheck, no sorry/postulate beyond bridge primitives.

* v1.2.1: Redesign env indicator dropdown + auto-detection

- Dropdown now matches design: colored pill badge with ▾ arrow in top
  bar; submenu shows section header "UMGEBUNG WECHSELN", current env
  row with "aktuell" label (non-clickable), other env row with
  "→ wechseln" link in green

  environments, no manual selection needed; manual setting used as fallback

- Updated README changelog (v1.2.1)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Mc1H7pZ4usAn3HpL7Ljf4p

* v1.2.2: Overhaul Dashboard tab layout and UX

- Each feature section (Widget-Verwaltung, Oberes Banner, Inhaltstypen-Banner)
  is now a card with a toggle-switch master control and collapsible body
- Body panels collapse/expand with animation; master toggle shows/hides
  child options, making the master switch meaningful
- Top Banner columns redesigned as 2×2 card grid with plain textareas
  instead of 4 stacked TinyMCE editors — faster, cleaner, more maintainable
- Active/inactive badge per section updates live on toggle
- Added CSS for toggle switch, section cards, checkbox grid, column grid
- Added JS section-toggle logic to admin.js
- README: v1.2.2 changelog

* v1.2.3: Stability, performance and compatibility audit fixes

Bugs:
- Fix env indicator never showing with URL auto-detection only (manual
  setting = off but URLs configured) — register hooks when any URL is set
- Remove dead try_gutenberg_panel code (removed in WP 5.4)
- Add is_array() guard in hide_admin_menu_items() (PHP 8 TypeError safety)

Performance:
- Cache wpd_get_options() result in a static variable — eliminates
  repeated wp_parse_args + defaults merging per request
- Replace gettext filter for greeting with admin_bar_menu hook (priority
  200) — gettext fired on every __() call (100s/page), admin_bar_menu fires once

Code quality:
- Make maintenance mode text translatable
- Remove redundant require_once helpers.php in activation hook
- Sync WPD_VERSION constant and plugin header to 1.2.3

fix: correct xrdp session startup and disable GNOME for Fedora 40+

xrdp's DefaultWindowManager (startwm-bash.sh) sources
/usr/libexec/xrdp/startwm.sh which goes through the distro
Xsession chain — it never reads /etc/xrdp/startwm.sh directly.

GNOME 47+ (Fedora 40+) is Wayland-only and crashes with SIGTRAP
when started on X11 via xrdp. Disable GNOME for Fedora 40+,
matching the existing KDE restriction.

commit.message:
Fix/issue 9 cancelled error pagination (#12)

* test: add BLE device simulator and integration tests

Introduces OcleanDeviceSimulator (tests/simulator.py), a builder-pattern
mock that fires realistic BLE notification sequences without physical hardware.

Adds 22 integration tests (tests/test_simulator.py) covering:
- Oclean X full session pipeline: 0307 + 2604 + 0000 → all fields populated
- Oclean X Pro extended 0308: score, areas, pressure, tz-offset in one record
- Score-overwrite protection: 0308 score not clobbered by later 0000 notification
- Sensor state mapping: native_value and available for all entity types

Updates conftest.py stubs minimally to support sensor.py imports:
EntityCategory, SensorEntityDescription(**kwargs), CoordinatorEntity[T].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add log-based regression test generator

Adds tools/generate_tests_from_log.py which parses oclean_ble.log and
emits a ready-to-run pytest file (tests/test_generated_real_data.py).

Key design decisions:
- Expected values are computed by running the CURRENT parser on the
  captured raw bytes, not taken from the log's parsed output.  Generated
  tests therefore stay correct after parser changes without needing manual
  updates.
- Polls are grouped by "Oclean poll start:" (new logs) or by the first
  "notification raw:" line (old logs without the boundary marker).
- Duplicate poll patterns (same notification byte sequence) are collapsed
  into one test to avoid redundancy.

Also adds "Oclean poll start: mac=... ts=..." debug log line to
coordinator._setup_and_read() to provide reliable poll boundaries for
future logs.

Generated from existing oclean_ble.log: 26 unique patterns → 26 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: catch asyncio.CancelledError in _paginate_sessions (#9)

When connecting through an ESPHome BLE proxy, `write_gatt_char()` in
`_paginate_sessions` could be cancelled by the proxy (network timeout
or proxy disconnect), raising `asyncio.CancelledError`.

In Python 3.8+ `asyncio.CancelledError` inherits from `BaseException`,
not `Exception`.  The existing `except Exception` block therefore did
not catch it, and the error propagated up through `_setup_and_read` →
`_poll_device` → `_async_update_data`, crashing the entire poll.

Fix: catch `(Exception, asyncio.CancelledError)` so that a cancelled
pagination write is treated as "no more pages" instead of a fatal error.
The poll then completes successfully with whatever sessions were already
collected.

Closes #9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Fix popup OAuth: use onAuthStateChange + storage event for reliable iframe auth

  so the iframe detects the session written by the popup's Supabase client
- Popup closes reliably after auth completes

Refactor summary generation with rich context, validator, and retry

llm.ts — new SummaryContext interface (topic, roundCount, conversationLines,
emotionalThemes, acceptedInsights, clarifiedInsights, finalUserTurns);
buildSummaryPrompt(ctx) builds a context-rich system prompt that injects all
real conversation data and specifies 3 distinct emphases (emotional clarity /
pattern-meaning / readiness-awareness); validateSummaries() checks word count
(20-80), first-person start, 10 forbidden phrases, and pairwise Jaccard
similarity (>0.45 flags as too similar); _callSummaryWithRetry() retries once
on parse failure or validation failure before falling back;
makeSummaryFallbacks(ctx) produces topic/emotion-specific non-generic fallbacks;
callSummary() signature changed from string to SummaryContext; dev stub uses
context-aware fallbacks

summary/page.tsx and summary/route.ts both updated to build SummaryContext
from loaded messages: conversation lines combine reflection_text +
followUpQuestion for assistant turns; emotionalThemes deduped from emotionLabel
fields; acceptedInsights/clarifiedInsights from insightResponse; finalUserTurns
= last 3 user messages

any SQLite code path from executing in Vercel's ephemeral environment.

fix: remove n_dendritic_Ca_spikes sentinel, add target name to zero-variance log

- emergent_properties.py: stop including n_dendritic_Ca_spikes in patched
  data (was set to -1 for ALL trials, causing guaranteed zero variance).
  Property is only computable from raw V_dend traces during simulation.

  so we can identify exactly which targets are degenerate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix iOS Safari auto-zoom on sign-in modal

iOS Safari zooms in when an input field with font-size < 16px receives
focus, and does not zoom back out — causing the modal to appear cut off
on the right on mobile. Three fixes applied:

- Add maximum-scale=1.0 to viewport meta to prevent auto-zoom at the
  browser level
- Extend input CSS rules to cover email and password types (previously
  only text was styled), and bump font-size from 0.95rem to 1rem (16px)
  — the threshold below which iOS triggers auto-zoom
- Remove autoFocus from the email input in SignInModal so iOS cannot
  zoom in the moment the modal opens
- Bump .btn-auth-link font-size from 0.875rem to 1rem for readability
- Increase input vertical padding from 0.625rem to 0.75rem for a
  more comfortable touch target on mobile

commit.message:
fix: remove "use node" from auth.ts (mutations can't run in Node.js)

Convex only allows actions in Node.js runtime files, but convexAuth()
exports store (a mutation). The standard providers: [Google] pattern
reads env vars at request time, not module init, so "use node" is
unnecessary.

Fix place not appearing after add: use insert response instead of refetch

updating places state. Instead, use the data returned directly from the
insert (with users+favorite_places join) to immediately update local state.
This avoids the failing refetch entirely and gives instant feedback.
